title: mentzelia argillicola
intro: Mentzelia argillicola, also known as Sandstickyputty or Sandstickypuff, is a rare annual plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). Native to the southwestern United States, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentzelia argillicola are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antioxidant activities. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea from its roots and leaves, and it can also be used in salves and tinctures for topical application.
